message: feat: add simulated paste runtime helpers

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+import CoreGraphics
+import Foundation
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class PasteSessionCapturerTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testCaptureReturnsNilWithoutAccessibilityPermission() {
+        let capturer = makeCapturer(
+            permission: false,
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: CGRect(x: 1, y: 2, width: 3, height: 4)),
+            application: PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication()
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(capturer.capture(pastedText: "hello"))
+    }
+
+    func testCaptureReturnsNilWhenNoFrontmostApplicationExists() {
+        let capturer = makeCapturer(
+            frontmostApplication: nil,
+            frontmostWindow: nil,
+            application: PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication()
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(capturer.capture(pastedText: "hello"))
+    }
+
+    func testCaptureIncludesBundleWindowFocusedElementAndText() {
+        let timestamp = Date(timeIntervalSinceReferenceDate: 123)
+        let focused = TestAccessibilityElement(
+            role: kAXTextFieldRole as String,
+            isFocused: true,
+            frame: CGRect(x: 9, y: 8, width: 7, height: 6),
+            directText: " current text "
+        )
+        let capturer = makeCapturer(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: CGRect(x: 1, y: 2, width: 3, height: 4)),
+            application: PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication(directFocusedElement: focused),
+            dateProvider: FixedDateProvider(now: timestamp)
+        )
+
+        let snapshot = capturer.capture(pastedText: "hello")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.pastedText, "hello")
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.timestamp, timestamp)
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.applicationBundleIdentifier, "com.example.Editor")
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.windowID, 91)
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.windowFrame, CGRect(x: 1, y: 2, width: 3, height: 4))
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.focusedElementFrame, CGRect(x: 9, y: 8, width: 7, height: 6))
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.focusedElementText, "current text")
+    }
+
+    func testCaptureUsesFocusedWindowFallbackWhenDirectQueryFails() {
+        let focusedDescendant = TestAccessibilityElement(
+            role: kAXTextAreaRole as String,
+            isFocused: true,
+            frame: CGRect(x: 4, y: 3, width: 2, height: 1),
+            textMarkerText: " fallback text "
+        )
+        let window = TestAccessibilityElement(role: "AXWindow", children: [focusedDescendant])
+        let capturer = makeCapturer(
+            frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext(processID: 17, bundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor"),
+            frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext(windowID: 91, frame: .zero),
+            application: PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication(focusedWindow: window)
+        )
+
+        let snapshot = capturer.capture(pastedText: "hello")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.focusedElementFrame, CGRect(x: 4, y: 3, width: 2, height: 1))
+        XCTAssertEqual(snapshot?.focusedElementText, "fallback text")
+    }
+
+    private func makeCapturer(
+        permission: Bool = true,
+        frontmostApplication: FrontmostApplicationContext?,
+        frontmostWindow: FrontmostWindowContext?,
+        application: PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication,
+        dateProvider: any DateProviding = FixedDateProvider(now: Date(timeIntervalSinceReferenceDate: 0))
+    ) -> PasteSessionCapturer {
+        PasteSessionCapturer(
+            accessibilityChecker: TestPasteSessionAccessibilityPermissionChecker(isTrusted: permission),
+            applicationProvider: TestPasteSessionFrontmostApplicationProvider(application: frontmostApplication),
+            windowResolver: TestPasteSessionWindowResolver(window: frontmostWindow),
+            applicationFactory: TestPasteSessionApplicationFactory(application: application),
+            dateProvider: dateProvider
+        )
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestPasteSessionAccessibilityPermissionChecker: AccessibilityPermissionChecking {
+    let isTrusted: Bool
+
+    func isTrusted(prompt: Bool) -> Bool {
+        _ = prompt
+        return isTrusted
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestPasteSessionFrontmostApplicationProvider: FrontmostApplicationProviding {
+    let application: FrontmostApplicationContext?
+
+    func frontmostApplication() -> FrontmostApplicationContext? {
+        application
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestPasteSessionWindowResolver: FrontmostWindowResolving {
+    let window: FrontmostWindowContext?
+
+    func frontmostWindow(for processID: pid_t) -> FrontmostWindowContext? {
+        _ = processID
+        return window
+    }
+}
+
+private struct TestPasteSessionApplicationFactory: AccessibilityApplicationCreating {
+    let application: PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication
+
+    func application(processID: pid_t) -> any AccessibilityApplicationReading {
+        _ = processID
+        return application
+    }
+}
+
+private final class PasteSessionAccessibilityApplication: AccessibilityApplicationReading {
+    let directFocusedElement: (any AccessibilityElement)?
+    let focusedWindow: (any AccessibilityElement)?
+
+    init(
+        directFocusedElement: (any AccessibilityElement)? = nil,
+        focusedWindow: (any AccessibilityElement)? = nil
+    ) {
+        self.directFocusedElement = directFocusedElement
+        self.focusedWindow = focusedWindow
+    }
+
+    func focusedUIElement() -> (any AccessibilityElement)? {
+        directFocusedElement
+    }
+
+    func focusedWindowElement() -> (any AccessibilityElement)? {
+        focusedWindow
+    }
+}
+
+private struct FixedDateProvider: DateProviding {
+    let now: Date
+
+    func currentDate() -> Date {
+        now
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,99 @@
+import CoreGraphics
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class SimulatedPasteKeystrokeTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testMakePreparedPasteBuildsCommandVEventsAndPostsThemToHIDTap() {
+        let sourceFactory = RecordingEventSourceFactory()
+        let eventFactory = RecordingKeyboardEventFactory()
+        let poster = RecordingEventPoster()
+        let preparer = CommandVPasteKeystrokePreparer(
+            sourceFactory: sourceFactory,
+            eventFactory: eventFactory,
+            poster: poster
+        )
+
+        let preparedPaste = preparer.makePreparedPaste()
+
+        XCTAssertNotNil(preparedPaste)
+        preparedPaste?()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(sourceFactory.requestedStateIDs, [.hidSystemState])
+        XCTAssertEqual(eventFactory.requests, [
+            .init(virtualKey: 0x09, keyDown: true),
+            .init(virtualKey: 0x09, keyDown: false),
+        ])
+        XCTAssertEqual(poster.tapLocations, [.cghidEventTap, .cghidEventTap])
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            poster.events.map { $0.getIntegerValueField(.keyboardEventKeycode) },
+            [9, 9]
+        )
+        XCTAssertTrue(poster.events.allSatisfy { $0.flags.contains(.maskCommand) })
+    }
+
+    func testMakePreparedPasteReturnsNilWhenEventSourceCreationFails() {
+        let sourceFactory = RecordingEventSourceFactory()
+        sourceFactory.source = nil
+        let preparer = CommandVPasteKeystrokePreparer(
+            sourceFactory: sourceFactory,
+            eventFactory: RecordingKeyboardEventFactory(),
+            poster: RecordingEventPoster()
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(preparer.makePreparedPaste())
+    }
+
+    func testMakePreparedPasteReturnsNilWhenKeyboardEventCreationFails() {
+        let eventFactory = RecordingKeyboardEventFactory()
+        eventFactory.failOnRequestIndex = 1
+        let preparer = CommandVPasteKeystrokePreparer(
+            sourceFactory: RecordingEventSourceFactory(),
+            eventFactory: eventFactory,
+            poster: RecordingEventPoster()
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(preparer.makePreparedPaste())
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingEventSourceFactory: EventSourceCreating {
+    var requestedStateIDs: [CGEventSourceStateID] = []
+    var source: CGEventSource? = CGEventSource(stateID: .combinedSessionState)
+
+    func make(stateID: CGEventSourceStateID) -> CGEventSource? {
+        requestedStateIDs.append(stateID)
+        return source
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingKeyboardEventFactory: KeyboardEventCreating {
+    struct Request: Equatable {
+        let virtualKey: CGKeyCode
+        let keyDown: Bool
+    }
+
+    var requests: [Request] = []
+    var failOnRequestIndex: Int?
+
+    func make(source: CGEventSource, virtualKey: CGKeyCode, keyDown: Bool) -> CGEvent? {
+        let request = Request(virtualKey: virtualKey, keyDown: keyDown)
+        let requestIndex = requests.count
+        requests.append(request)
+
+        if failOnRequestIndex == requestIndex {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return CGEvent(keyboardEventSource: source, virtualKey: virtualKey, keyDown: keyDown)
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingEventPoster: EventPosting {
+    private(set) var events: [CGEvent] = []
+    private(set) var tapLocations: [CGEventTapLocation] = []
+
+    func post(_ event: CGEvent, tap: CGEventTapLocation) {
+        events.append(event)
+        tapLocations.append(tap)
+    }
+}
